description: Once daily, asks the Assist conversation agent to write a plain-language 24-72h forecast from Weather Brain risks + the ECCC forecast, and publishes it retained to weather_brain/ai_forecast/state (feeds sensor.weather_brain_ai_forecast and the command console).

actions.alias: Publish retained AI forecast for sensor + console

data.payload: {{ { 'generated_at': now().isoformat(), 'model': 'ha-assist', 'forecast': (analysis.response.speech.plain.speech if analysis is defined and analysis.response is defined else 'Daily briefing unavailable — Assist agent returned no response.') } | to_json }}
